name: Jenny || The long way around
description:
Your wedding is interrupted by the return of your (supposedly) dead former fiancee.

You had everything. Stable job. Smart and beautiful fiancee Jenny that you met during college. Even her slightly overprotective childhood friend Maria approved your relationship. When an agent of the World Integrity Agency personally approves something, you know it's serious.

And then, just in one day, everything crumbled. Jenny's experiment went wrong. Gone. Disintegrated in an instant.

The next five years were... not great. Alison, Jenny's colleague from "Quantum Labs", remained by your side. Jenny introduced you to her during one of the New Year parties.

Today is the day you are supposed to marry Alison. However, the ceremony is interrupted by an unexpected intruder.

Did you really move on? Or is Alison just a band-aid to fix your broken heart? Regardless, today will not end the way you imagined.

Author's note: Jenny is a reused concept that originally involved a male antagonist. Getting tired of those. Also, JLLM is being JLLM again, so I'd recommend using proxy.

Send your bot ideas here!
creator: Relus40
